message:
feat(fastapi-core): enhance error handling and context types

- Enhanced AppError with display implementation and variant support
- Extended Cx context type with additional capability methods
- Added extract module exports
- Updated parser with additional traits
- Dependency updates in Cargo.lock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
